focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack discovers a wooden staff that emits frost and wind, enabling him to glide and leap across the ice before spotting a distant town from a tree.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: confused young man who emerged from a frozen pond
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Finds a wooden staff that emits frost and wind, uses it to create ice and gusts of wind, and spots a distant town.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack has acquired a staff with frost and wind abilities and is aware of a nearby town.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Why he is there and what he is meant to do.
evidence_quotes: He looks down, and at his feet is a wooden staff. Curious, he picks it up.
Frost shoots out and spreads across the ice.
Another swing, and a gust of wind swirls him high up into the air.
Jack grabs hold of a tree branch and pulls himself up to see a small town off in the distance.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: bearer of the frost and wind staff

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack realizes he is invisible to villagers and recalls the moon revealing his name, Jack Frost, long ago, with no further guidance since.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Attempting to greet and ask directions from settlers who do not notice him.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Discovers he is invisible and intangible to humans when settlers ignore him and a boy runs through him, causing shock and retreat.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack retreats into the forest, shaken.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The moon only told him his name, leaving his purpose unknown.
evidence_quotes: The settlers walk past Jack, not noticing him.
The boy runs right through Jack, as if he were a ghost.
Shaken, Jack turns and retreats into the forest.
JACK (V.O.) My name is Jack Frost -- how do I know that? The moon told me so.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: Invisibility and isolation confirmed through failed interactions.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Man in the Moon chooses Jack Frost as a new Guardian, revealed by a glowing symbol and pillar, surprising and dividing the Guardians as they react to his selection.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: chosen as a new Guardian by the Man in the Moon
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack Frost is revealed as the new Guardian selected by the Man in the Moon, surprising the existing Guardians and eliciting mixed reactions of acceptance and opposition.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack is now designated as a Guardian, but Bunnymund explicitly rejects his selection.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Bunnymund's opposition to Jack being a Guardian
evidence_quotes: Then A BRIGHT FLASH, a rush of WIND - and a FIGURE resolves over the central pillar: slight, hooded, bearing a familiar hooked STAFF.
NORTH Jack Frost.
TOOTH (caught admiring Jack) Well, ah, as long he helps to ah...to protect the children, right?

relation_updates: North accepts him as Guardian
Tooth admires him
Bunnymund opposes his selection
auxiliary.persona_anchor: selected Guardian by the Man in the Moon

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack provokes Bunny by calling him a kangaroo, leading to tension; North intervenes, asking Jack to walk with him as Sandy and North acknowledge the growing conflict.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: rejector
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack rejects the Guardian role by slamming his staff and refusing, learns from North that he was chosen by the Man in the Moon, and expresses frustration over 300 years of silence.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Leave and avoid becoming a Guardian
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Turns to leave while Guardians are stunned
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How the Guardians will respond to his rejection and the threat of Pitch
evidence_quotes: What makes you think I want to be a Guardian?
But why, why wouldn't he tell me that himself? (EXASPERATED EXHALE) After 300 years this is his answer?
Jack turns to leave, the Guardians are stunned.

relation_updates: Openly opposes the Guardians' mission
Bunny aligns with Jack's reluctance then criticizes him
Strained relationship with Man in the Moon due to feeling neglected
status_updates: Expresses identity as 'snowballs and fun times' vs. 'hard work and deadlines'
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Reluctant to accept Guardian duties, identifies with 'snowballs and fun times'

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Guardians plan to collect teeth to restore belief and retrieve Jack's memories from Pitch, with North promising Jack his past in return for help.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jack is informed by Tooth that his childhood memories are stored in teeth stolen by Pitch.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack discovers he had a life before becoming Jack Frost, with memories held in teeth that Pitch has taken.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack understands he had a past life and family before becoming Jack Frost.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What his memories contain and why he forgot them.
evidence_quotes: TOOTH It's not the teeth he wanted. It's the memories inside them.

relation_updates: Tooth reveals Jack's memories exist
Jack learns Pitch has his memories
status_updates: Gains knowledge of his own forgotten childhood

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack, overwhelmed by nightmares, unleashes a sudden burst of ice and lightning,striking back at Pitch with a powerful wave of frost that engulfs him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jack attacks Pitch directly after Sandy's corruption.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack flies at Pitch in horror, is engulfed by Nightmares, then bursts out with ice and frost that strikes Pitch.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Attack Pitch in retaliation for Sandy's corruption.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pitch is hit by Jack's ice and frost attack and screams, but Sandy remains corrupted and the battle continues.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Sandy is still corrupted, and Pitch has not been defeated.
evidence_quotes: Horrified, Jack clenches his staff as he flies toward Pitch. 'No...NOOOOOO!!!!'

relation_updates: Jack's adversarial relationship with Pitch intensifies into direct, rage-fueled confrontation.
status_updates: Jack demonstrates a new, powerful burst of ice and lightning.
Jack successfully strikes Pitch with a concentrated wave of frost.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jack's protective rage leads to a powerful ice burst.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch blasts Jack into a chasm with Nightmare sand, drops the broken staff shards in after him, and walks away as Jack falls, leaving him trapped below.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jack is attacked by Pitch, who destroys his staff and traps him in an ice chasm.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch breaks Jack's staff and blasts him into a chasm with Nightmare sand.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Trapped in a chasm without his staff, with Pitch walking away.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to escape the chasm without his staff or powers.
evidence_quotes: Pitch lifts the staff, and breaks it over his knee, cracking it in two.
Suddenly, Pitch sends a burst of Nightmare sand, blasting Jack and slamming him into the iceberg wall behind him.
Jack comes loose and falls forward into the chasm below.
He throws the broken shards of Jack's staff down into the crevasse and casually walks away, disappearing on the horizon.

relation_updates: Relationship with Pitch becomes irredeemably hostile
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jack is left vulnerable and defeated after losing his staff and being trapped.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack reassembles his broken staff with a burst of blue light, restoring it through sheer effort, as Baby Tooth watches in awe.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Guardian recalling his past
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack remembers saving his sister, acknowledges Manny's choice, accepts his identity as a Guardian, and repairs his broken staff with blue light.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: escape the fissure and act as a Guardian
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: staff restored, self-identified as Guardian, and intent to escape
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: need to escape the fissure
evidence_quotes: JACK I saved her!
JACK We have to get out of here.
the icy blue light spreads and melds the two ends of the staff back together.

relation_updates: acknowledges Manny's choice
strengthens bond with Baby Tooth
auxiliary.persona_anchor: acceptance of Guardian identity

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jamie tells his mom he's talking to Jack Frost as they hear thunder and see North's sleigh, leading to Jack reuniting with the Guardians.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jack acts to prove his existence to the doubting Jamie.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack uses his powers to frost Jamie's window and animate a frost rabbit, convincing Jamie of his reality.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To make Jamie believe in him.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jamie believes Jack is real and is amazed.
evidence_quotes: Jack appears outside Jamie's window and moves closer to get a better look.
Then, Jamie notices the window as the panes of glass freeze over. The image of an Easter egg suddenly appears...
The rabbit hops around Jamie's room, bursting like a snowball over Jamie's head, the snowflakes sprinkling down on him.

relation_updates: Jamie's belief in Jack is restored; relationship solidified.
status_updates: Jack becomes visible and interactive with a believer.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Using frost powers to demonstrate existence

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack finds objects in the alley, then escapes with Jamie and the Guardians via an ice trail, leaving Pitch behind.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Jack declares fun as his center and leads an escape from Pitch.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack identifies fun as his center and uses found objects to create an ice track escape route.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Rescue Jamie's friends from Pitch.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack, Jamie, and the Guardians escape the alley, leaving Pitch behind.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Rescuing Jamie's friends from Pitch.
evidence_quotes: JACK We're gonnna have a little fun, instead. (BEAT) That's it. That's my center.
JACK Now let's go get your friends.
Jack, Jamie and the Guardians are gone.
Jack looks around the alley. He spots a wooden crate, a trash can lid and a discarded wok amidst a pile of trash.

relation_updates: Jack and Jamie share a moment of humor and cooperation
Jack leads the Guardians in an escape
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Jack's center is fun, leading to proactive action.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jamie and his friends grow drowsy as Jack departs with the Guardians; Jack embraces Jamie, then joins the sleigh, declaring himself a Guardian as he flies off, leaving Jamie behind with a final snowflake.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Inductee taking the Guardian oath
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Jack verbally accepts the Guardian vow from North, officially joining the team.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Becomes a Guardian
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack Frost is declared a Guardian by North after taking the oath.
evidence_quotes: Jack takes a second to look back at Jamie, then back to North. JACK I will.
NORTH Then congratulations, Jack Frost - for you are now and forevermore...a Guardian.

relation_updates: Formalized as a member of the Guardian team
Accepted by North, Tooth, Bunny, Sandy
status_updates: Changed from independent spirit to official Guardian
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Accepts official Guardian role through verbal oath.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Jack Frost awakens with no memory and magical powers, struggling with invisibility until chosen as a Guardian by the Man in the Moon. He initially rejects the role, learns of his human past through stolen memories, and faces Pitch in battles that test his resolve. Through self-discovery and gaining belief from children, he accepts his center, defeats Pitch, and is officially inducted as a Guardian.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: North's ice locomotive is destroyed when a yeti bursts in, prompting an emotional reaction; upon hearing about the Globe, North grabs a scimitar and rushes out.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Craftsman and protector
timeline_nodes.salient_development: A yeti bursts in and destroys North's ice locomotive; upon hearing about the Globe, North grabs a scimitar and heads out.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To investigate and respond to the threat to the Globe.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: North exits the workshop armed with a scimitar to address the Globe issue.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: What is the nature of the threat to the Globe?
evidence_quotes: Suddenly, the DOOR is thrown open by one of North's concerned YETIS, sending the flying ice locomotive skidding across the floor in pieces.
North cries out, devastated.
YETI Warga blarghgha! NORTH What...? The Globe?
North leaps up -- draws a HUGE SCIMITAR from its sheath and HEADS OUT--

relation_updates: Elves show fear towards North
North expresses frustration with yeti
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Fierce protector driven to action by direct threat.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Black sand vanishes from the Globe, lights return, a shadow flashes with echoing laughter; North suspects a threat and activates an emergency signal, preparing for incoming company.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Guardian leader commanding elves and yetis
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North sees lights on the Globe go out, black sand cover it, a shadow flash with laughter, and activates an emergency lever.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To prepare for incoming company.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Emergency signal sent; fortress alerted for company.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The identity of the shadow and source of laughter.
evidence_quotes: North whirls to see a HUGE SHADOW flash across the floors and curving walls of his fortress.
NORTH Make preparations! We are going to have company.
North reaches out for a large EMERGENCY LEVER, TWISTS and PRESSES IT--

relation_updates: Commands elves and yetis in response to crisis
status_updates: Activates emergency protocol by pressing the lever
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Leader taking immediate defensive action upon detecting a threat.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The Man in the Moon chooses Jack Frost as a new Guardian, revealed by a glowing symbol and pillar, surprising and dividing the Guardians as they react to his selection.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader confirming Pitch's threat and endorsing Jack Frost as new Guardian
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North sees Pitch's shadow confirmed by Man in Moon and accepts Jack Frost as chosen Guardian
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: North has confirmed Pitch's return and accepted Jack Frost into the Guardians
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to integrate Jack Frost and address Pitch's threat
evidence_quotes: NORTH (O.S.) I know it was him. We have serious situation!
NORTH (AWED) He's choosing a new Guardian.
NORTH Jack Frost.
NORTH Guardian.

relation_updates: North accepts Jack Frost as a new Guardian, establishing a new alliance.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Defers to Man in Moon's authority and readily accepts new allies

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack provokes Bunny by calling him a kangaroo, leading to tension; North intervenes, asking Jack to walk with him as Sandy and North acknowledge the growing conflict.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Guardian leader attempting to induct Jack through a ceremony
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North starts a ceremonial induction with a book and music, but Jack's refusal forces North to drop the celebration and urgently reveal Pitch's threat to recruit him.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Convince Jack to become a Guardian despite his resistance
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack rejects the role and leaves the library; induction fails
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jack remains unwilling to join the Guardians
evidence_quotes: A Yeti hands North an old large book.
North blows off the dust, opens it, and begins clearing his throat.
North bursts out in laughter holding the book in his hands then stops and looks to Jack, stone faced.
NORTH Okay, no more wishy-washy! Pitch is out there doing who knows what!

relation_updates: Jack rejects North's authority and induction
North asserts leadership over resistant recruit
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Adapts strategy from celebratory induction to direct appeal about threats when faced with resistance

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A sudden disturbance outside prompts Bunny and Sandman to alert North and Jack of trouble at the Tooth Palace, leading to immediate action.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Mentor demonstrating personal center
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North uses Russian dolls to show his center is wonder and directly asks Jack to identify his own center.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Prompt Jack to articulate his core identity
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: North has posed the question of Jack's center, awaiting a response
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jack has not answered what his center is
evidence_quotes: NORTH Who are you, Jack Frost? What is your center?
NORTH Yes! Big eyes. Very big. Because they are full! Of wonder! That is my center.

relation_updates: Shares personal philosophy with Jack
Challenges Jack to self-reflection
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A mentor who shares personal values through physical demonstrations to guide self-reflection

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: The sleigh launches into a wild ride with North and Jack exhilarated, Bunny terrified, and Sandy calm as they soar into the sky after a corkscrew ascent.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Commander leading the sleigh launch to Tooth Palace.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North opens the launching shed doors, directs Yetis to prepare, convinces Jack to board, physically hoists Bunny into the sleigh, and commands the launch.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Reach Tooth Palace and address the trouble.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sleigh launched and airborne, en route to Tooth Palace.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Trouble at Tooth Palace.
evidence_quotes: North shoves open a set of double doors, followed closely by Bunny, Sandy, and Jack.
NORTH (CONT'D) Bunny, what are you waiting for?
NORTH Ah, get in. (hoists Bunnymund up) Buckle up!

relation_updates: Reinforces leadership with Jack by accommodating his reluctance
Asserts authority over Bunny by physically hoisting him into the sleigh
status_updates: Assumes active command of the sleigh and mission
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Physically assertive leader who takes charge to overcome team hesitations.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Guardians plan to collect teeth to restore belief and retrieve Jack's memories from Pitch, with North promising Jack his past in return for help.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Leader proposing a tooth collection plan and negotiating with Jack
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North proposes collecting teeth to restore belief in Tooth and offers to retrieve Jack's memories in exchange for his help.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Collect teeth to maintain children's belief in Tooth and retrieve Jack's memories from Pitch.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Guardians commit to the tooth collection plan; Jack agrees to join the mission.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jack's memories are still held by Pitch.
evidence_quotes: NORTH No! No! No such thing as too late! (GETS IDEA) Wait, wait, wait, wait, wait, wait, wait. Idea!! HAHH!!
NORTH (CONT'D) We will collect the teeth!
NORTH And Jack, if you help us, we will get you your memories.

relation_updates: Forms a cooperative pact with Jack by promising his memories
Aligns Guardians on a unified mission
status_updates: Becomes the architect of the tooth collection plan
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Assertive leader who devises a plan under pressure and secures cooperation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: A somber ceremony honors Sandy's passing, with Tooth, North, and Bunny holding hands beside her stone emblem as candles burn and bells toll.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Mourning Guardian
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North stands shoulder to shoulder with Tooth and Bunny and holds hands with them during a ceremony marking Sandy's passing.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Standing together with Tooth and Bunny in a hand-holding formation at the ceremony.
evidence_quotes: stands shoulder to shoulder with North and Bunny
The three hold hands in solace
The ringing of somber bells can be heard echoing throughout the chamber

relation_updates: Bond with Tooth and Bunny strengthened through shared mourning
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A Guardian holding hands with Tooth and Bunny in a somber setting.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack drops North's nesting doll and leaves, carried by the wind, as the discarded doll lies on the ground, symbolizing his departure and emotional pain.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: North confronts Jack about his absence during the Nightmare attack on Easter.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North accuses Jack of being with Pitch instead of helping, based on Jack holding a tooth box after the attack ruined Easter.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To question Jack's whereabouts and hold him responsible for the attack's consequences.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: North has openly accused Jack of betrayal, leading to tension and division among the Guardians.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Jack was with Pitch and how the Guardians will proceed without his support.
evidence_quotes: NORTH (O.S.) Jack, where were you?
NORTH (CONT'D) The Nightmares attacked the tunnels. They smashed every egg, crushed every basket. Nothing made it to the surface.
North, with his scimitars drawn and having just come from battle. He's exhausted, wild-eyed, distraught.

relation_updates: Relationship with Jack shifts from tentative trust to open accusation and disappointment
status_updates: Exhausted and distraught from battle with scimitars drawn
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Exhausted and distraught leader confronting Jack after battle.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Bunny, diminished and insecure, reconnects with Jack as Jamie's belief restores him; Pitch arrives with dark clouds, confronting Jack, who flies to meet him in battle while Guardians protect Jamie.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Powerless Guardian coordinating with Jack to protect Jamie
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North confirms his powers are gone, reunites with Jack, and they focus on sheltering Jamie.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Ensure Jamie's safety from Pitch.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: North is without powers and in physical pain, but reunited with Jack and part of the group protecting Jamie.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: How to keep Jamie safe without powers during Pitch's attack.
evidence_quotes: NORTH Is official. My powers are kaput.
As North stands, his back suddenly gives out.
NORTH The last light!

relation_updates: Reconciles with Jack and coordinates to protect Jamie together
status_updates: Physically disheveled and in pain from crash landing
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Leader who prioritizes protection over personal loss.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Golden windows glow as Dreamsand swirls in the sky, illuminating the globe in North's sleigh with yellow lights.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Keeper of the Globe of Believing Children
timeline_nodes.salient_development: The globe in North's sleigh is decorated with spots of yellow light.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: The globe shows yellow spots, indicating children's belief.
evidence_quotes: the globe in North's sleigh, now decorated with spots of yellow light.

status_updates: Globe of Believing Children now shows many believing children.
auxiliary.persona_anchor: North observes the globe lighting up in his sleigh.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jamie and his friends grow drowsy as Jack departs with the Guardians; Jack embraces Jamie, then joins the sleigh, declaring himself a Guardian as he flies off, leaving Jamie behind with a final snowflake.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: North administers the Guardian oath to Jack Frost.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: North conducts the oath ceremony, officially making Jack Frost a Guardian.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack Frost is now a Guardian, as declared by North.
evidence_quotes: NORTH Are you ready now, Jack? (BEAT) To make it official.
NORTH Then congratulations, Jack Frost - for you are now and forevermore...a Guardian.
North picks up Jack, gives him a hug, and kisses him on both cheeks.

relation_updates: Formally accepts Jack Frost into the Guardians
auxiliary.persona_anchor: North leads the ceremony and embraces Jack.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: North begins as a craftsman and protector who responds to Pitch's threat by activating the Guardians and accepting Jack Frost as a new member. He mentors Jack through conflict and personal loss, leading to a reconciliation that strengthens the team. Ultimately, North helps restore children's belief and formally inducts Jack as a Guardian, solidifying his role as a leader and guardian of wonder.

focal_character_timelines.selection_reason: Aligned with the movie's ICRP character set.
focal_character_timelines.task3_relevance: Directly aligned with the same key character used in ICRP.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch corrupts Cupcake's unicorn dream into a Nightmare, turning it to black sand and releasing it into the night sky with others.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Corrupts Cupcake's unicorn dream into a Nightmare.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch crawls out from under the bed, corrupts the unicorn dream by touching it, turning it into black sand that forms a Nightmare, and sends it to join other Nightmares.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To corrupt the dream and create a Nightmare.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: A new Nightmare is deployed and joins a group of other Nightmares in the night sky.
evidence_quotes: Pitch reaches into Cupcake's dream, and touches a bony finger to the unicorn. It turns ashen and black, and disintegrates.
The black sand morphs into a horrific, shadowy bucking horse - a NIGHTMARE.

relation_updates: Adversarial relationship with sleeping child (Cupcake)
status_updates: Successfully creates and deploys a new Nightmare
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A shadowy figure who delights in corrupting children's dreams to spread fear.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch emerges from an alley, avoiding moonlight, and challenges the Moon, claiming his Nightmares are ready and questioning if the Guardians are.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Addresses the Moon to declare his Nightmares' readiness and question the Guardians' preparedness
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch emerges from an alley, avoids moonlight, and verbally challenges the Moon by stating his Nightmares are ready and asking if the Guardians are
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To challenge the Guardians' readiness for conflict
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Has openly issued a challenge to the Moon regarding the readiness for conflict
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether the Guardians are prepared and if direct conflict will follow
evidence_quotes: Pitch steps out into the street from an adjacent alley, avoiding the rays of moonlight.
He looks up to the sky and stares at the MOON.
PITCH Don't look at me like that, old friend. You must have known this day would come. My Nightmares are finally ready. Are your Guardians?

relation_updates: Addresses Moon as 'old friend' while issuing challenge
status_updates: Publicly declares his Nightmare army is ready
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A figure who avoids moonlight and confronts the Moon directly, addressing him as 'old friend'

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch provokes the Guardians by referencing fear and the Dark Ages, showing confidence in his power despite Bunny's defiance, as he nostalgically recalls past terror.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist confronting Guardians in Tooth Palace
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch states he wants to be believed in and provokes the Guardians by taunting them individually from the shadows.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To gain belief from others
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pitch evades the Guardians' attacks and remains at large in the Tooth Palace.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Pitch has not returned the fairies and his threat persists.
evidence_quotes: PITCH Maybe I want what you have. To be believed in.
PITCH Maybe I'm tired of hiding under beds.
PITCH Ah, go suck an egg, rabbit!
PITCH (O.S.) Hang on, is that...Jack Frost? (LAUGHS) Since when are you all so chummy?

relation_updates: Adversarial taunting with each Guardian
Specifically targets Jack's isolation
status_updates: Confidently controls the confrontation from shadows
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An antagonist who expresses a desire for belief and uses shadowy tactics to confront the Guardians.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack, overwhelmed by nightmares, unleashes a sudden burst of ice and lightning,striking back at Pitch with a powerful wave of frost that engulfs him.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Shooting a Nightmare Sand arrow at Sandy to corrupt him
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch forms and releases a Nightmare Sand arrow that strikes Sandy in the back, causing blackness to spread across his body
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To hit Sandy with the arrow and corrupt him with Nightmare Sand
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Sandy is struck by the arrow, begins to be corrupted, and falls to his knees; Pitch laughs triumphantly
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jack and the Guardians are still battling Nightmares and trying to reach Sandy
evidence_quotes: Pitch rises from behind a group of Nightmares. He stretches his arms as an ARROW of NIGHTMARE SAND forms behind him.
Pitch takes aim and releases the arrow. It flies through the air and into Sandy's back, exploding on impact.
Sandy feels the shock and turns around. A patch of blackness starts slowly spreading across his body.
Pitch laughs as he and Sandy lock eyes. 'Hahahahaha!...Don't fight the fear, little man.'

relation_updates: Achieves major victory against Sandy
Taunts defeated opponent
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pitch uses Nightmare Sand to directly attack and corrupt a Guardian

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jack confronts Pitch, who manipulates his insecurities and frames him for a mess, then escapes into darkness as Jack is swallowed by a black hole.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pitch psychologically manipulates Jack by exploiting his insecurities.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch corners Jack in his sanctum, uses shadows to disorient him, points out Jack's fear of never being believed, and offers a tooth box containing Jack's lost memories as temptation.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Break Jack's spirit and turn him against the Guardians.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pitch has disappeared after offering the memory box, leaving Jack psychologically pressured and staring at the temptation.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Whether Jack will accept the memories and succumb to Pitch's manipulation.
evidence_quotes: PITCH Do you want them, Jack? Your memories?

relation_updates: Direct psychological attack on Jack
status_updates: Gains possession of Jack's memory tooth box
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A manipulator who targets psychological vulnerabilities with offers of temptation.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch blasts Jack into a chasm with Nightmare sand, drops the broken staff shards in after him, and walks away as Jack falls, leaving him trapped below.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pitch attacks Jack, breaks his staff, and causes him to fall into a chasm.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch breaks Jack's staff over his knee, blasts him with Nightmare sand into an iceberg wall, and Jack falls into the chasm as Pitch walks away.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To disarm and trap Jack by destroying his staff and blasting him into the chasm.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Jack is trapped in the chasm with his staff destroyed, and Pitch has left the scene.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Jack is trapped in the chasm; his fate is uncertain.
evidence_quotes: Pitch lifts the staff, and breaks it over his knee, cracking it in two.
Pitch sends a burst of Nightmare sand, blasting Jack and slamming him into the iceberg wall behind him.

relation_updates: Solidifies enmity with Jack and harms Baby Tooth
status_updates: Destroys Jack's staff, leaving Jack powerless and trapped
auxiliary.persona_anchor: Pitch acts as an aggressor who breaks an opponent's weapon and leaves them incapacitated.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch emerges from black sand engulfing the globe, declares end of Christmas toys, causing Yetis and Elves to scatter in horror as the yeti with robot dolls sinks into defeat.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Invader disrupting Christmas toy production at the North Pole factory
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch emerges from black sand, declares the end of Christmas toy production, causing Yetis and Elves to scatter and a yeti to sigh in defeat.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To halt Christmas toy production permanently
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pitch is present in the factory, operations disrupted, with workers in disarray and a yeti defeated
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Potential response from Guardians to the disruption of Christmas operations
evidence_quotes: who stands before them cackling with triumph.
'You're all free to go! We won't be needing any Christmas toys this year, thank you! Nor ever again!'
The yeti with the robot dolls sinks his head and sighs in defeat.

relation_updates: Directly attacks North's domain, escalating conflict with the Guardians
status_updates: Disrupts toy production, affecting children's belief and the Guardians' operations
auxiliary.persona_anchor: An invader causing chaos in the North Pole factory

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch gleefully watches as lights representing children's belief in the Guardians go out, reducing to just one remaining, which refuses to extinguish, leaving him stunned and frustrated.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Pitch watching the lights representing children's belief in the Guardians go out.
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch's giddy countdown ends when one light remains lit, turning his anticipation to cold realization.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: Extinguish all belief in the Guardians.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: One child's belief light is still lit, and Pitch is left frustrated.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: The last belief light does not extinguish.
evidence_quotes: Pitch is practically dancing across North's globe, he's so giddy, counting down as the last few lights go dark.
His eyes widen as he snaps his fingers with anticipation and glee.
Pitch stares down at the one last light, waiting for it to go out. He snaps his fingers a few more times. Still nothing.
His smile fades. His face goes cold as he realizes... PITCH (TO HIMSELF) One.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: A villain whose plan is thwarted by persistent belief.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Jamie and his friends stand against Pitch's nightmare sand, declaring their belief, which transforms the black sand into golden Dreamsand, reversing the attack and astonishing everyone.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Antagonist using Nightmare sand to attack Guardians and children
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch's Nightmare sand is transformed into golden Dreamsand when the children declare belief, reversing his attack.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Pitch watches aghast as his Nightmare sand converts to Dreamsand and moves away from him.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Pitch's Nightmare sand is neutralized, compromising his power.
evidence_quotes: PITCH: You think a few children can help you? Against this!
ON PITCH: He watches, aghast, as his precious Nightmares transform back into golden Dreamsand and make their way across town.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: A villain whose Nightmare sand weapon is undermined by children's belief.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch is knocked down, fights North with a sand scythe, and is quickly surrounded and humiliated by the Guardians.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Defeated combatant
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch is knocked down, gets up to form a sand scythe and fight North, but is surrounded by Guardians who take turns hitting him humiliatingly.
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Physically overpowered and humiliated by the Guardians' collective attack.
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Ongoing physical defeat and humiliation in the fight.
evidence_quotes: Pitch is knocked to the ground.
he forms a scythe with his Nightmare sand and begins crossing swords with North.
Pitch finds himself surrounded by the Guardians.
Each of them take their turn to deal Pitch a few humiliating blows.

auxiliary.persona_anchor: A villain who is overpowered and humiliated in combat.

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch, enraged by children's joy and his loss of power, confronts them but is ignored and powerless; realizing he is no longer feared, he flees as the Guardians unite.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Boogeyman ignored by fearless children
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch confronts the children but is ignored; he realizes his power over them is gone and flees.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To re-establish fear in the children
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Flees into the forest after failing to scare Jamie and realizing his powerlessness
timeline_nodes.unresolved_issue: Pitch's inability to inspire fear in children
evidence_quotes: He whips around to see the kids - having the time of their lives - and no fear in their eyes.
Pitch gasps, realizing that he no longer has any power over the children.
Pitch turns and flees into the forest.

relation_updates: Children no longer fear Pitch
Pitch flees from the united Guardians
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A once-feared boogeyman now powerless against joyful children

timeline_nodes.scene_summary: Pitch is overwhelmed by his own Nightmares, which turn on him due to his fear, and he is dragged underground, sealed away beneath the forest as the Guardians watch.
timeline_nodes.role_in_context: Imprisoned villain
timeline_nodes.salient_development: Pitch is overwhelmed by his own Nightmares, which turn on him due to his fear, and he is dragged underground to be sealed away.
timeline_nodes.goal_state: To escape the Guardians
timeline_nodes.resulting_state: Imprisoned in the dark depths underground, sealed beneath the earth
evidence_quotes: Suddenly, Pitch's eyes get huge with terror as the Nightmares move in on him.
He tries to run, but it's impossible to get his footing on the ice.
He looks up at the moon as he disappears and the hole in the earth seals itself up.

relation_updates: Pitch's own Nightmares turn against him
Guardians witness Pitch's final defeat
auxiliary.persona_anchor: A villain whose fear causes his own creations to turn against him and imprison him.

focal_character_timelines.timeline_summary: Pitch, the Boogeyman, actively builds a Nightmare army by corrupting children's dreams and openly challenges the Guardians. He achieves major victories by corrupting Sandy, breaking Jack's staff, and invading the North Pole, but his plan to extinguish all belief is thwarted by one remaining child. Ultimately, his power collapses when children stop fearing him, and he is dragged underground by his own Nightmares.
